description: Spill 1 performance budget — refresh with `npm run perf:baseline` after an intentional change. Reviewers must check the `current` diff carefully; see scripts/performance-budget/README.md for the review protocol.
_note: Initial budget set by the performance-budget-ci-gate PR. `current` values are placeholders derived from a pre-fix reference run; they will be rewritten by the first post-merge `npm run perf:baseline` on main once the backdrop-filter regression is resolved. The `max` values are intentionally generous so the gate does not false-positive before the first real baseline lands.
